layout_and_spacing.grid_system: bento-style for marketing, structured for product grids

motion_and_effects.global: Smooth scroll enabled via Lenis or framer-motion.
motion_and_effects.scroll_animations: Text fade and slide up on scroll (Framer Motion).
motion_and_effects.hover_effects: Buttons with red glow using `hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(230,32,32,0.6)]` and scale up slightly.
motion_and_effects.textures: Subtle smoke/grain noise overlay fixed full screen with pointer-events-none opacity-20.

hero.description: Large aggressive text, dark background with grain, parallax effect on background image, red accent line at the bottom.

marquee.description: Repeating text 'LOCKED ANGLE · DRIFT CULTURE · JDM · BUILT SIDEWAYS · SMOKE & STEEL ·'. Fast/medium speed. Font Bebas Neue.

product_card.description: Clean product image, dark background (#111111), red glow on hover. Minimal details.

brand_statement.description: White text on black. High impact. Heavy padding.

collection_banner.description: Dark gritty streetwear model image as background with overlay, bold red CTA button.

buttons.style: Square edges (rounded-none), pure red bg or transparent with red border. Red glow on hover.

hero_background.description: Cinematic drift car with massive smoke, dark luxury motorsport vibe.

collection_banner_bg.description: Gritty streetwear model with red neon accent.

about_bg.description: Moody underground garage, red lights, concrete floor.

products.description: Premium black streetwear t-shirt on carbon fiber texture.
products.title: Sideways Heavyweight Tee

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use the provided colors: #0a0a0a (black base), #f0ede8 (off-white text), #e62020 (blood red accents), #ff5500 (exhaust orange highlights).
Do NOT use any pastels, bright whites, floral, rounded fonts, or purple gradients.
Implement smooth scrolling, parallax, and text slide-up animations using Framer Motion.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on their role.
Add a fixed noise/grain overlay div (`pointer-events-none`) across the app.
Use square borders (`rounded-none`) for all cards, form inputs, and buttons to maintain the aggressive raw look.
Use 'Bebas Neue' for all main headings (uppercase) and 'Chivo' for body text.
Do not use generic placeholder images, ONLY use the URLs provided in the media object.
